[Congressional Bills 106th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 21 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                      January 19, 1999.
    Resolved, That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to 
the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on the Budget: Mr. Collins of Georgia and Mr. Wamp of Tennessee, 
both to rank in the named order following Mr. Ryun of Kansas.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
